payload.answer: Rejected: Input lacks specificity for durable memory. Clarify: (1) Definition of 'AI' (e.g., field, entity, or other), (2) Punctuation constraints (e.g., 'A.I.' vs. 'AI'), and (3) Scope (e.g., technical, cultural, or historical).
citations: ISO/IEC 2382-13:2020 (Information technology — Vocabulary — Part 13: Artificial intelligence)
Linguistic ambiguity in proper nouns (e.g., 'AI' as a company vs. 'AI' as a concept)

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguity in 'AI' (e.g., artificial intelligence, A.I. as a company, or other uses) and lack of punctuation constraints prevent resolution. Requires explicit clarification.

memory_cards.statement: Input 'Remember everything about AI' is overly broad and lacks specificity for durable memory storage. Punctuation (e.g., 'AI' vs. 'A.I.') and scope (e.g., 'AI' as artificial intelligence vs. 'AI' as a proper noun) are ambiguous without context.

details: Scope not constrained (e.g., cultural vs. technical AI).

repair_options: Specify: 'Remember everything about artificial intelligence (AI) as a field, excluding A.I. as a company.'
Clarify punctuation: 'Remember all facts about 'A.I.' (with periods) as a company.'
Narrow scope: 'Remember only technical definitions of AI from 2023 NIST frameworks.'
